problem id: 62c6e1c5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  00000101 -> 10000010
  00010101 -> 10001010
  01100111 -> 10000011
  01001001 -> 00100100
  00001000 -> 00000100
  00010011 -> 10001001
  00011100 -> 00001110
  11011101 -> 00101110
  10011001 -> 01001100

query: 11101000
predicted answer: 01110100
